mapper.select: SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, employee.boss_role, employee.has_boss, employee.created_at, employee.updated_at, boss.boss_id, boss_employee.name AS boss_name, boss_employee.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates ON employee.employee_id = boss_subordinates.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON boss_subordinates.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee AS boss_employee ON boss.employee_id = boss_employee.employee_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}
SELECT employee_id, name, title, boss_role, has_boss, created_at, updated_at FROM employee

SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, boss.boss_id, be.name AS boss_name, be.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates bs ON employee.employee_id = bs.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON bs.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee be ON boss.employee_id = be.employee_id

SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, employee.boss_role, employee.has_boss, employee.created_at, employee.updated_at, boss.boss_id, boss_employee.name AS boss_name, boss_employee.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates ON employee.employee_id = boss_subordinates.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON boss_subordinates.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee AS boss_employee ON boss.employee_id = boss_employee.employee_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( name, title, boss_role, has_boss, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{title}, #{bossRole}, #{hasBoss}, NOW(), NOW() )
